claims.claim_text: London Underground Zone 1 adult pay-as-you-go Oyster peak fare

sources.title: Mayor of London / GLA — MD3464 March 2026 TfL fare changes (Annex Table A1, Zones 1-6 PAYG rail fares)
sources.note: Official Mayoral Decision setting TfL fares from March 2026. Adult PAYG single fare for a journey including Zone 1 (1 zone): peak £2.90. Peak times: Mon-Fri 06:30-09:30 and 16:00-19:00 (excluding public holidays).

verification_event.note: Read directly from london.gov.uk official Mayoral fare decision (MD3464) and Annex Table A1. 2026-06-27 기준. 최종 사람 승인 대기.

claims.claim_text: London Underground Zone 1 adult pay-as-you-go Oyster off-peak fare

sources.title: Mayor of London / GLA — MD3464 March 2026 TfL fare changes (Table 1.2, Adult PAYG fares including Zone 1)
sources.note: Official Mayoral Decision setting TfL fares from March 2026. Adult PAYG single fare for a journey including Zone 1 (1 zone): off-peak £2.80. Off-peak fares apply at all other times outside the peak windows.

verification_event.note: Read directly from london.gov.uk official Mayoral fare decision (MD3464), Table 1.2. 2026-06-27 기준. 최종 사람 승인 대기.

claims.claim_text: London Underground Zone 1 daily Oyster/contactless cap

sources.title: Transport for London — Adult caps and Travelcard prices (2026) / Fare capping
sources.note: Official TfL fare capping page and content.tfl.gov.uk/adult-fares.pdf (Adult rate prices 2026): Zone 1 only daily anytime pay-as-you-go cap £8.90 (Monday-Sunday cap £44.70). Same £8.90 daily cap applies to Zones 1-2.

verification_event.note: Read directly from tfl.gov.uk official Fare capping page and official Adult fares PDF. 2026-06-27 기준. 최종 사람 승인 대기.
